ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Continued To Nov-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Frangos for and with Doris Vassallo (Administrator). Arthur Vassallo (Beneficary).

Mr. Frangos provided the background of the case and reported that one of the heirs in Australia is deceased. The Court indicated that there are notice and distribution issues and waiver of notice is not proper. The matter was continued to November 4, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file an amendment that sets forth the distribution, file a 13100 declaration and give notice using the Judicial Council form.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Jul-17-2012 Continued To Aug-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights [Probate Code Sec 11700]
Off Calendar Aug-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights [Probate Code Sec 11700]
Off Calendar Jul-03-2012 Continued To Jul-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Francos for and with Doris Vassallo (Administrator). Arthur Vassallo is also present. Trent Thornley for Anthony Mangon, Alfrieda Bellia and Joseph Mangion (Petitioners).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to who has the burden of proof and termination of parental rights. Mr. Thornley argued that it has been established that his clients are children of the decedent and that they are entitled to distribution. He further argued that they were not adopted and there are no evidence of adoption and that the Administrator have the burden of proof. The Court noted that there is nothing before the Court that the children were adopted in Australia or that the parental right was terminted. Mr. Francos is seeking for release of the records in Malta to prove adoption/abandonment. The Petition to Determine Distribution Rights is continued to July 17, 2012 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 for new declaration and reply to declaration. No appearance is required on July 17 and matter will be taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Lelu.
